message:
fix(scripts): use portable repo-local target directories instead of hardcoded absolute paths

Replace all hardcoded /data/projects/franken_engine/target_rch_*
absolute paths with repo-local equivalents ($PWD or ${root_dir}) so
that CI scripts, verification commands, and the RGC contract work
correctly from any checkout location:

- scripts/run_rgc_react_capability_contract.sh: Change default
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR from hardcoded /data/projects/franken_engine/
  target_rch_rgc_react_capability_contract to ${root_dir}/
  target_rch_rgc_react_capability_contract.

- scripts/e2e/frankenctl_cli_workflow.sh: Namespace target_dir with
  mode and PID (target_namespace="${mode}_$$") to prevent parallel
  CI runs from clobbering each other's build artifacts.

- docs/RGC_REACT_CAPABILITY_CONTRACT_V1.md and
  docs/rgc_react_capability_contract_v1.json: Update operator
  verification commands to use $PWD/target_rch_*_verify instead of
  the hardcoded path.

- tests/frankenctl_cli.rs: Update assertions to match the new
  namespaced target_dir pattern in the e2e script.

- tests/rgc_react_capability_contract.rs: Update path assertions to
  verify portable $PWD paths. Add new test
  rgc_016a_gate_script_uses_repo_local_target_dir_default that
  verifies the gate script uses ${root_dir}/... and does not contain
  the hardcoded absolute path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,7 +132,7 @@ with:
 jq empty docs/rgc_react_capability_contract_v1.json
 
 rch exec -- env \
-  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/franken_engine/target_rch_rgc_react_capability_contract \
+  CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$PWD/target_rch_rgc_react_capability_contract_verify" \
   cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test rgc_react_capability_contract \
   --test rgc_executable_compatibility_target_matrix

@@ -419,7 +419,7 @@
   ],
   "operator_verification": [
     "jq empty docs/rgc_react_capability_contract_v1.json",
-    "rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/franken_engine/target_rch_rgc_react_capability_contract cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test rgc_react_capability_contract --test rgc_executable_compatibility_target_matrix",
+    "rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=\"$PWD/target_rch_rgc_react_capability_contract_verify\" cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test rgc_react_capability_contract --test rgc_executable_compatibility_target_matrix",
     "./scripts/run_rgc_react_capability_contract.sh ci",
     "./scripts/e2e/rgc_react_capability_contract_replay.sh ci"
   ]
